summary: Packet cites evidence labels without usable handles, breaking traceability and requiring artifact revision before reuse.

findings.title: Missing evidence handle for traceability
findings.summary: Claimed evidence label A lacks a usable evidence handle, preventing auditability without exposing private details.

findings.title: Opaque evidence handle requires caller retrieval
findings.summary: Evidence label B cites an opaque handle that still requires caller-owned retrieval to verify.
